item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: The New York Knicks won their first NBA championship in 53 years after beating the San Antonio Spurs 94-90 in Game 5 of the NBA Finals.

media:content.media:text: New York Knicks guard Jalen Brunson drives as San Antonio Spurs center Luke Kornet (7) defends during the second half of Game 5 of the NBA Finals basketball series, Saturday, June 13, 2026, in San Antonio.
media:content.media:description: New York Knicks guard Jalen Brunson drives as San Antonio Spurs center Luke Kornet (7) defends during the second half of Game 5 of the NBA Finals basketball series, Saturday, June 13, 2026, in San Antonio.

media:content.media:text: APTOPIX NBA Finals Knicks Spurs Basketball
media:content.media:description: The New York Knicks celebrate after defeating the San Antonio Spurs in Game 5 of the NBA Finals basketball series in San Antonio on June 13, 2026.

media:content.media:text: NBA Finals Knicks Spurs Basketball
media:content.media:description: New York Knicks fans at a watch party in New York on Saturday night.

media:content.media:text: 2026 NBA Finals - Game Five
media:content.media:description: Karl-Anthony Towns of the New York Knicks blocking Victor Wembanyama of the San Antonio Spurs during the fourth quarter on Saturday.

item.title: Knicks win first NBA championship since 1973, beat Spurs 94-90 in Game 5

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: Brazil and manager Carlo Ancelotti are already facing harsh scrutiny after just one World Cup game, a 1-1 draw with Morocco.

media:content.media:text: Brazil head coach Carlo Ancelotti reacts during the World Cup match between Brazil and Morocco in East Rutherford, N.J., near New York, Saturday, June 13, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Brazil head coach Carlo Ancelotti reacts during the World Cup match between Brazil and Morocco in East Rutherford, N.J. on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Brazil v Morocco: Group C - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Brazil head coach Carlo Ancelotti reacts during the World Cup match between Brazil and Morocco in East Rutherford, N.J. on Saturday.

item.title: Just one game in, Brazil and Carlo Ancelotti are already under fire

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: Pochettino, a 54-year-old Argentine, has been on the job for 20 months, but Friday’s game was unquestionably his biggest opportunity to make an impression on a wider fanbase tuning in to watch the U.S. for the first time.

media:content.media:text: USA v Paraguay: Group D - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Mauricio Pochettino, head coach of the U.S. men, speaks to the media after the team's victory Friday.

item.title: Coaching the U.S. was a big test for Mauricio Pochettino. Then his World Cup opener went ‘amazing.’

item.dc:creator: Greg Rosenstein
item.description: Folarin Balogun, born in Brooklyn but raised in London, agreed to play his international career with the Americans in 2023. Three years later he opened the World Cup with two goals.

media:content.media:text: USA v Paraguay: Group D - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Folarin Balogun #20 of the United States celebrates scoring his team's second goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group D match between USA and Paraguay at Los Angeles Stadium on June 12, 2026 in Los Angeles, California.

item.title: Folarin Balogun chose the U.S. over England. It’s already paying off in the World Cup.

item.description: Brasil evitó la derrota en su debut al empatar 1-1 con Marruecos, que volvió a demostrar su gran nivel. Además, Escocia regresó a los Mundiales con una victoria sobre Haití y Catar sumó el primer punto de su historia en una Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: ¡Vini salva a Brasil! Marruecos vuelve a sorprender en el Mundial | Radar Mundial
media:content.media:description: Brasil evitó la derrota en su debut al empatar 1-1 con Marruecos, que volvió a demostrar su gran nivel. Además, Escocia regresó a los Mundiales con una victoria sobre Haití y Catar sumó el primer punto de su historia en una Copa del Mundo.

item.title: ¡Vini salva a Brasil! Marruecos vuelve a sorprender en el Mundial | Radar Mundial

item.description: Los analistas evalúan el empate 1-1 entre Brasil y Marruecos en el debut de la Canarinha. Vinicius Junior rescató un punto para el equipo de Carlo Ancelotti. Además, analizan el gran partido de Marruecos, la ausencia de Neymar y posibles ajustes.

media:content.media:title: ¿Debe preocuparse Brasil tras su empate ante Marruecos? | Puesta a Punto Mundial
media:content.media:description: Los analistas evalúan el empate 1-1 entre Brasil y Marruecos en el debut de la Canarinha. Vinicius Junior rescató un punto para el equipo de Carlo Ancelotti. Además, analizan el gran partido de Marruecos, la ausencia de Neymar y posibles ajustes.

item.title: ¿Debe preocuparse Brasil tras su empate ante Marruecos? | Puesta a Punto Mundial

item.description: Pese a llegar como favoritos, los europeos no pudieron con unos "Socceros" que se impusieron con goles de Irankunda y Metcalfe para afianzarse en la parte alta del Grupo D junto a Estados Unidos, firmando una noche histórica en Vancouver.

media:content.media:title: Australia debuta con triunfo tras 20 años y firma la primera sorpresa del Mundial 2026 ante Turquía
media:content.media:description: Pese a llegar como favoritos, los europeos no pudieron con unos "Socceros" que se impusieron con goles de Irankunda y Metcalfe para afianzarse en la parte alta del Grupo D junto a Estados Unidos, firmando una noche histórica en Vancouver.

item.title: Australia debuta con triunfo tras 20 años y firma la primera sorpresa del Mundial 2026 ante Turquía

item.description: Los "Socceros" tejieron la jugada desde la mediacancha y tras una serie de toques, el de St. Pauli recibió la pelota, la condujo y desde afuera del área sacó un zurdazo letal que venció al arquero para firmar el segundo en Vancouver.

media:content.media:title: Gol de Connor Metcalfe sentencia el partido para Australia ante Turquía en el Mundial 2026
media:content.media:description: Los "Socceros" tejieron la jugada desde la mediacancha y tras una serie de toques, el de St. Pauli recibió la pelota, la condujo y desde afuera del área sacó un zurdazo letal que venció al arquero para firmar el segundo en Vancouver.

item.title: Gol de Connor Metcalfe sentencia el partido para Australia ante Turquía en el Mundial 2026

item.description: Los campeones del mundo desmenuzan la presentación de la “Verdeamarela” ante los africanos, en el partido más atractivo de la primera fase. La leyenda brasileña le exige más al equipo de Ancelotti de cara al segundo juego.

media:content.media:title: El mejor partido del Mundial hasta ahora": Dunga y Valdano analizan a Brasil en su debut
media:content.media:description: Los campeones del mundo desmenuzan la presentación de la “Verdeamarela” ante los africanos, en el partido más atractivo de la primera fase. La leyenda brasileña le exige más al equipo de Ancelotti de cara al segundo juego.

item.title: El mejor partido del Mundial hasta ahora": Dunga y Valdano analizan a Brasil en su debut

item.description: Tras una jugada que nació desde las manos del arquero Patrick Beach, dos toques y un pase largo, el delantero del Watford condujo hasta el área y se inventó un remate cruzado para vencer a Cakir y coronar en las redes una jugada de antología.

media:content.media:title: Golazo de Nestory Irankunda inaugura el marcador para Australia ante Turquía en el Mundial 2026
media:content.media:description: Tras una jugada que nació desde las manos del arquero Patrick Beach, dos toques y un pase largo, el delantero del Watford condujo hasta el área y se inventó un remate cruzado para vencer a Cakir y coronar en las redes una jugada de antología.

item.title: Golazo de Nestory Irankunda inaugura el marcador para Australia ante Turquía en el Mundial 2026

item.description: El gol de John McGinn en la primera parte fue suficiente para que los escoceses consigan los tres puntos y sean líderes del Grupo C, por encima de Brasil y Marruecos, quienes empataron en el otro partido.

media:content.media:title: Escocia venció a Haití en su regreso a la Copa del Mundo
media:content.media:description: El gol de John McGinn en la primera parte fue suficiente para que los escoceses consigan los tres puntos y sean líderes del Grupo C, por encima de Brasil y Marruecos, quienes empataron en el otro partido.

item.title: Escocia venció a Haití en su regreso a la Copa del Mundo

item.description: El seleccionador italiano asumió la responsabilidad del empate de la "Verdeamarela" ante Marruecos en el debut mundialista, prometió mejoría y aceptó las críticas; además, aseguró que no se gana un Mundial en el primer partido.

media:content.media:title: Carlo Ancelotti tras debut de Brasil: "Perdón por no ganar hoy" | Conferencia de prensa
media:content.media:description: El seleccionador italiano asumió la responsabilidad del empate de la "Verdeamarela" ante Marruecos en el debut mundialista, prometió mejoría y aceptó las críticas; además, aseguró que no se gana un Mundial en el primer partido.

item.title: Carlo Ancelotti tras debut de Brasil: "Perdón por no ganar hoy" | Conferencia de prensa

item.description: Tras el 1-1, Marquinhos pide contundencia y Hakimi ve un gran aprendizaje ante un favorito. Ancelotti, que rotará el plantel tras un debut rápido y difícil

media:content.media:title: Voces del Mundial: Marruecos es nuevo peso pesado y Brasil se exige más
media:content.media:description: Tras el 1-1, Marquinhos pide contundencia y Hakimi ve un gran aprendizaje ante un favorito. Ancelotti, que rotará el plantel tras un debut rápido y difícil

item.title: Voces del Mundial: Marruecos es nuevo peso pesado y Brasil se exige más

item.description: El delantero brasileño reconoción que no tuvieron un mal primer tiempo y que les costó recibir un gol.

media:content.media:title: Vinicius: “Debemos mejorar y evolucionar”
media:content.media:description: El delantero brasileño reconoción que no tuvieron un mal primer tiempo y que les costó recibir un gol.

item.title: Vinicius: “Debemos mejorar y evolucionar”

item.description: President Trump announced on Saturday that a peace deal with Iran will be signed on Sunday, and that immediately afterward the Strait of Hormuz will be open. The prime minister of Pakistan said a deal was closer “than ever before.” NBC News’ Daniele Hamamdjian has the latest.

media:content.media:title: U.S.-Iran deal could be finalized within days, Trump and Iranian officials say
media:content.media:description: President Trump announced on Saturday that a peace deal with Iran will be signed on Sunday, and that immediately afterward the Strait of Hormuz will be open. The prime minister of Pakistan said a deal was closer “than ever before.” NBC News’ Daniele Hamamdjian has the latest.

item.title: U.S.-Iran deal could be finalized within days, Trump and Iranian officials say

item.description: A Kennedy Center official told a federal judge Saturday that all references to President Donald Trump inside, outside and online have been removed from the Kennedy Center, in compliance with the court’s extended order requiring their removal by noon.

media:content.media:title: Trump’s name removed from Kennedy Center
media:content.media:description: A Kennedy Center official told a federal judge Saturday that all references to President Donald Trump inside, outside and online have been removed from the Kennedy Center, in compliance with the court’s extended order requiring their removal by noon.

item.title: Trump’s name removed from Kennedy Center

item.description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

media:content.media:title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

item.title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: The New York Knicks won their first NBA championship in 53 years after beating the San Antonio Spurs 94-90 in Game 5 of the NBA Finals.

media:content.media:text: New York Knicks guard Jalen Brunson drives as San Antonio Spurs center Luke Kornet (7) defends during the second half of Game 5 of the NBA Finals basketball series, Saturday, June 13, 2026, in San Antonio.
media:content.media:description: New York Knicks guard Jalen Brunson drives as San Antonio Spurs center Luke Kornet (7) defends during the second half of Game 5 of the NBA Finals basketball series, Saturday, June 13, 2026, in San Antonio.

media:content.media:text: APTOPIX NBA Finals Knicks Spurs Basketball
media:content.media:description: The New York Knicks celebrate after defeating the San Antonio Spurs in Game 5 of the NBA Finals basketball series in San Antonio on June 13, 2026.

media:content.media:text: NBA Finals Knicks Spurs Basketball
media:content.media:description: New York Knicks fans at a watch party in New York on Saturday night.

media:content.media:text: 2026 NBA Finals - Game Five
media:content.media:description: Karl-Anthony Towns of the New York Knicks blocking Victor Wembanyama of the San Antonio Spurs during the fourth quarter on Saturday.

item.title: Knicks win first NBA championship since 1973, beat Spurs 94-90 in Game 5

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: Brazil and manager Carlo Ancelotti are already facing harsh scrutiny after just one World Cup game, a 1-1 draw with Morocco.

media:content.media:text: Brazil head coach Carlo Ancelotti reacts during the World Cup match between Brazil and Morocco in East Rutherford, N.J., near New York, Saturday, June 13, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Brazil head coach Carlo Ancelotti reacts during the World Cup match between Brazil and Morocco in East Rutherford, N.J. on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Brazil v Morocco: Group C - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Brazil head coach Carlo Ancelotti reacts during the World Cup match between Brazil and Morocco in East Rutherford, N.J. on Saturday.

item.title: Just one game in, Brazil and Carlo Ancelotti are already under fire

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero
Bill Feather
Angela Dallman
item.description: The pilot of a military fighter jet escaped with minor injuries after the aircraft crashed into a Washington state mountain and sparked a brush fire Saturday, authorities said

media:content.media:text: The pilot of a military fighter jet ejected and suffered minor injuries after a crash in Washington state Saturday, authorities said.
media:content.media:description: The pilot of a military fighter jet ejected and suffered minor injuries after a crash in Washington state Saturday, authorities said.

item.title: Pilot safely ejects before fighter jet crashes into mountain in Washington state woodlands

item.dc:creator: Amina Kilpatrick
item.description: For 53 years, Knicks fans have endured heartbreak, bad luck and countless “maybe next years.” Now, with New York one game away from its first NBA championship, many fans aren’t taking any chances.

media:content.media:text: Madison Square Garden Subway Station is decorated in the orange and blue colors of the New York Knicks.
media:content.media:description: The New York Knicks-themed 34th Street Penn Station subway entrance in Manhattan last week.

media:content.media:text: Madison Square Garden Subway Station is decorated in the orange and blue colors of the New York Knicks.
media:content.media:description: The New York Knicks-themed 34th Street Penn Station subway entrance in Manhattan last week.

media:content.media:text: Madison Square Garden Subway Station is decorated in the orange and blue colors of the New York Knicks.
media:content.media:description: The New York Knicks-themed 34th Street Penn Station subway entrance in Manhattan last week.

item.title: One win away from glory, Knicks fans don’t want to miss the moment — or jinx it

item.dc:creator: Francie Ebert
item.description: Vanessa Trump said Saturday she is beginning the second stage of breast cancer treatment after spending the past four weeks recovering from surgery

media:content.media:text: Vanessa Trump looking over her left shoulder against a blurred background.
media:content.media:description: Vanessa Trump at the White House in 2018.

item.title: Vanessa Trump says she is beginning second stage of breast cancer treatment

item.dc:creator: Matt Lavietes
Christiana Corporon
item.description: New York Gov. Kathy Hochul slammed Ticketmaster and the San Antonio Spurs for barring fans who live outside the San Antonio area from purchasing tickets to Game 5 of the NBA Finals.

media:content.media:text: A Knicks fan pumps his fist and yells toward the camera while surrounded by fellow fans.
media:content.media:description: Knicks fans at a watch party in New York's Bryant Park during Game 3 of the NBA Finals last week.

item.title: N.Y. governor blasts Spurs and Ticketmaster for blocking Knicks fans from Finals

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Armed men in Haiti have kidnapped James Boyard, cabinet director of the Defense Ministry and a highly respected security expert who also serves as inspector general of Haiti’s police, a person with the knowledge of the situation said Saturday

media:content.media:text: Daily life in Port-au-Prince.
media:content.media:description: Daily life in Port-au-Prince, Haiti, on Feb. 27, 2025.

item.title: Armed men in Haiti’s capital seize a top security official in rare high-level abduction

item.dc:creator: Matt Lavietes
item.description: Tyra Banks filed a defamation lawsuit against Netflix on Saturday, accusing the streaming giant of manipulating her into participating in a bombshell documentary about her former reality show “America’s Next Top Model.”Netflix’s “Reality Check: Inside America’s Next Top Model” chronicles both the show’s historic successes and its controversies, including an early contestant claiming she was sexually assaulted on camera, another undergoing cosmetic surgery to remain in the competi

media:content.media:text: Tyra Banks.
media:content.media:description: Tyra Banks in Sydney in 2025.

item.title: Tyra Banks sues Netflix over ‘America’s Next Top Model’ doc
